creator: mi@ALDAN.star89.galstar.com
text:
Automatic build of port xspread fails. Patch does not
	apply automaticly. xmkmf fails after patch is applied manualy
	If go to work/xspread2.1 and do xmkmf by hands. Make works
	fine after that.

Fix: 

Do not know how to automate what I've done properly (-:.
	Must be somthing silly.
How-To-Repeat: 
	su
	cd /usr/ports/math/xspread
	make patch
